reasoning: The Comments History shows two internal notes dated Jan 13, 2026 explicitly recommending approval as a VIP exception. The notes state: (1) Customer has 42 orders and $6,200 lifetime value with only 2 previous refunds, (2) The company delayed response after customer contacted them at day 32 (outside 30-day policy), and (3) 'RECOMMENDATION: Approve as exception - our delay caused policy violation. Retain VIP relationship.' The order status is Complete with Shipped item status, but internal documentation confirms company error in handling the timely response, justifying approval despite policy timeframe.
